category.id: {"en":"Grid-tied PV inverter","zh":"并网光伏逆变器","zht":"併網光伏逆變器"}
category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

title.en: China-to-Canada Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against Canadian CSA/SCC electrical safety, ISED EMC, bilingual labelling, and provincial utility interconnection expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与加拿大 CSA/SCC 电气安全、ISED EMC、双语标签及省级电力公司并网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與加拿大 CSA/SCC 電氣安全、ISED EMC、雙語標籤及省級電力公司併網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SCC accreditation decision, ISED equipment assessment, provincial utility approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Canadian federal, provincial, electrical-code, EMC, bilingual labelling, and utility interconnection requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SCC 认可决定、ISED 设备评估、省级电力公司批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行加拿大联邦、省级、电气规范、EMC、双语标签及电力公司并网要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SCC 認可決定、ISED 設備評估、省級電力公司批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行加拿大聯邦、省級、電氣規範、EMC、雙語標籤及電力公司併網要求。

answer_first.en: Canada usually requires approval by an SCC-accredited certification body to Canadian electrical safety requirements, ISED EMC compliance for interference-causing or radio-equipped models, bilingual EN/FR markings and instructions, and separate provincial utility interconnection acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 进入加拿大通常需要由 SCC 认可认证机构按加拿大电气安全要求批准，干扰设备或带无线功能型号须符合 ISED EMC 要求，还须具备英/法双语标识和说明，并另行取得省级电力公司并网认可。
answer_first.zht: 進入加拿大通常需要由 SCC 認可認證機構按加拿大電氣安全要求批准，干擾設備或帶無線功能型號須符合 ISED EMC 要求，還須具備英/法雙語標識和說明，並另行取得省級電力公司併網認可。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, SCC, CSA Group, ISED, provincial utility, standards body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
